title: On Tuesdays, Orchids
writer: Carlos A. Olivari, Francisco Oyarzábal, Sixto Pondal Ríos
actors: Enrique Serrano, Juan Carlos Thorry, Nuri Montsé
plot: Elenita, the youngest of four sisters, is shy and romantic. To boost her confidence and create an illusion, her father sends her an orchids bouquet every week to make her believe she has a secret admirer.
